title: CCB LLM Judge Result
description: Per-task output from the LLM judge evaluating agent performance.

judge_score.description: Composite headline score from the judge (0.0-1.0)

judged_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the judgment was produced

rubric.description: Per-dimension scores from the judge rubric

correctness.description: How correct is the agent's solution?

completeness.description: Does the solution address all requirements?

code_quality.description: Is the code clean, idiomatic, and well-structured?

retrieval_quality.description: How well did the agent find relevant code and context?

efficiency.description: How efficiently did the agent use available tools?

rationale.description: Free-text explanation of the judge's assessment

oracle_confidence.description: Confidence level of the oracle ground truth used for judging

temperature.description: Sampling temperature used for judge LLM calls

vote_distribution.description: Per-dimension vote distribution across rounds (only for multi-round)

provenance.description: Full provenance metadata (model_id, ccb_commit, judge_version, confidence)

judge_context_path.description: Relative path to the context file provided to the judge
